summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky introduces a five-part series covering the development of FogBugz 4.0. He teases that the first installment will discuss major features added based on customer feedback. The post highlights Fog Creek's philosophy of prioritizing customer input over competitor analysis. It's essentially a table of contents entry rather than a substantive essay.
key_points: FogBugz 4.0 development will be covered in a five-part behind-the-scenes series
New features were driven by customer feedback rather than competitive analysis
Fog Creek's mantra is to listen to customers and ignore competitors
money_quotes: Our mantra is to listen to our customers and ignore our competitors.
key_insight: Product development should be driven by customer feedback rather than competitor imitation.
